name: agent-harness-skills
description: Reusable skills for building agent-ready repository harnesses.

interface.shortDescription: Repo harness practices for agent-ready engineering work
interface.longDescription: Use Agent Harness Skills as a compact methodology plugin to assess and design repository harnesses: entrypoint and role mapping, mechanical contracts, structural quality, validation surfaces, runtime evidence, and optional work-state and delivery governance.
interface.defaultPrompt: Assess this repository's agent harness maturity.
